default.general:
Sample question: "How many vacation days?"
Sample answer: Standard paid vacation is 28 calendar days for full-time employees.

it_support.general:
Sample question: "How do I request VPN access?"
Sample answer: Submit the VPN Access form in the IT Portal. Manager approval is required; access is provisioned within one business day.

legal_faq.general:
Sample question: "How long does our standard NDA last?"
Sample answer: The standard mutual NDA remains in effect for two years after the disclosure date unless terminated earlier in writing.
